title: Delicate Crisp Mediterranean Avocado Skillet
description: A solo dinner Mediterranean dish featuring avocado, with a delicate crisp texture, made in a cast-iron skillet, suitable for an ayurvedic tamasic-friendly diet. This recipe reduces complexity and emphasizes cultural flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the thinly sliced red onion and cook for 3 minutes until translucent.
Add the pitted kalamata olives and cook for 1 minute.
Add the crumbly feta cheese and cook for 1 minute until lightly browned.
Slice the ripe avocado and add it to the skillet.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
